spa_concept: Urban recovery spa for high-traffic leisure and nightlife corridor
design_theme: Modern urban luxury with sleek finishes, low-light recovery zones, and fast-service treatment flow
demand_profile: Very high demand, high walk-in and tourist traffic, late-day and evening strength
yield_profile: Medium-high yield with strong upsell potential but elevated leakage risk if execution is weak
seasonality_profile: High but resilient; benefits from both peak tourism and nightlife-driven demand
target_guest_mix: Short-stay tourists, nightlife visitors, couples, hotel guests, wellness-on-the-go clients
service_mix_priority: Express massage, recovery treatment, couples treatment, premium add-ons, short-format wellness
managerial_story_anchor: High-demand outlet with strong revenue potential, but requires tight conversion, upsell discipline, and queue control to prevent leakage.

spa_concept: Seafront premium wellness spa serving upscale leisure and urban resort demand
design_theme: Refined coastal elegance with bright premium interiors, calming sea-inspired palette, and polished luxury touchpoints
demand_profile: High demand with stronger premium conversion potential than pure nightlife zones
yield_profile: High yield supported by premium positioning, tourist spend, and repeat upscale clientele
seasonality_profile: Moderate-high seasonality with strong all-year relevance
target_guest_mix: Upscale tourists, expats, premium hotel guests, couples, repeat wellness clients
service_mix_priority: Signature massage, premium facial, couples ritual, wellness package, upgrade-led service mix
managerial_story_anchor: Flagship-style outlet suited for premium yield capture, brand image building, and selective growth expansion.

spa_concept: Boutique heritage ritual spa for curated high-yield city wellness experience
design_theme: Heritage luxury with stone textures, warm ambient lighting, intimate ritual rooms, and cultural refinement
demand_profile: Medium demand but high-value destination traffic with strong boutique appeal
yield_profile: High yield through curated premium rituals and boutique exclusivity
seasonality_profile: Relatively stable with lower volume than resort hubs
target_guest_mix: Cultural tourists, city-break couples, premium travelers, curated luxury seekers
service_mix_priority: Signature rituals, couples ritual, premium body treatment, slow wellness experience
managerial_story_anchor: Lower-volume, higher-yield outlet that demonstrates margin quality and premium positioning discipline rather than traffic scale.

spa_concept: Resort-volume spa built for package demand, family tourism, and hotel-linked treatment flow
design_theme: Comfortable resort spa with practical family-friendly layout, bright relaxation zones, and high-throughput usability
demand_profile: High seasonal demand with strong resort and family corridor volume
yield_profile: Medium yield, more volume-led than boutique-premium
seasonality_profile: High seasonality with strong summer concentration
target_guest_mix: Family tourists, resort guests, package buyers, leisure visitors, hotel-driven traffic
service_mix_priority: Classic massage, body treatment, family-friendly spa packages, hotel bundle services
managerial_story_anchor: Volume-led outlet where service throughput, scheduling discipline, and package monetization matter more than ultra-premium yield.

spa_concept: Coastal recovery spa serving beach leisure demand and seasonal restorative wellness
design_theme: Airy coastal retreat with natural textures, daylight-forward interiors, and beach-recovery atmosphere
demand_profile: Medium-high seasonal demand tied to beach and family leisure patterns
yield_profile: Medium-high yield with strong package and after-sun recovery potential
seasonality_profile: Very seasonal, strongest in leisure-heavy periods
target_guest_mix: Beach tourists, families, leisure travelers, resort guests, recovery-oriented spa users
service_mix_priority: Recovery massage, body wrap, after-sun treatment, couples package, wellness package
managerial_story_anchor: Seasonal outlet that tests how well management can convert peak leisure demand into profitable package yield without overbuilding fixed complexity.

spa_concept: All-year wellness club balancing local repeat demand, business travel, and accessible spa usage
design_theme: Clean contemporary wellness club with practical comfort, stable daily rhythm, and repeat-visit usability
demand_profile: Stable medium demand with lower tourism volatility and stronger local repeat logic
yield_profile: Medium-high yield supported by memberships, repeat visits, and controlled operational stability
seasonality_profile: Low seasonality and strong year-round usability
target_guest_mix: Local residents, expats, business travelers, repeat members, weekday wellness users
service_mix_priority: Membership treatments, repeat facial, massage maintenance, lunch-hour wellness, efficient recurring services
managerial_story_anchor: Operationally stable outlet suited to demonstrate repeat-business economics, workforce balance, and dependable year-round commercial control.

spa_concept: Destination retreat spa designed for slow wellness, package yield, and restorative premium escape demand
design_theme: Nature-led retreat luxury with earthy materials, quiet treatment environment, and slow-wellness atmosphere
demand_profile: Lower volume than Malta core hubs but distinct retreat-oriented destination demand
yield_profile: High yield through retreat packages, premium rituals, and longer-stay wellness positioning
seasonality_profile: Moderate seasonality with slower but differentiated demand rhythm
target_guest_mix: Retreat travelers, slow-tourism couples, premium wellness guests, escape-seeking visitors
service_mix_priority: Retreat ritual, half-day wellness, premium massage, signature body treatment, package-led wellness experience
managerial_story_anchor: Low-volume, high-yield outlet that proves a spa network should include destination wellness logic, not just traffic-heavy urban demand.
